content:
🌟 gdrive | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Managing Google Drive files and folders via a command-line interface.
✨ Key Features: • Command-line interface for Google Drive interaction • File and folder management • Account management (add, export, import) • Successor to gdrive2 with basic functionality implemented
📖 Summary: gdrive is a command-line interface (CLI) application built with Rust for interacting with Google Drive. It allows users to manage their files and folders directly from the terminal, acting as a successor to previous gdrive versions.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
